summary: Read-only comparison completed. P1-12 and P1-15 are not satisfied by current installer/release/sync code: missing P1 smoke tests, release/recovery manifest and drill artifacts, unauthenticated GitHub login/resume recovery, bundled Git/gh/runtime staging evidence, current artifact-to-release parity, two-PC safe sync fixtures, protected dirty/divergent/conflict hold logic, github_backup_status, cross-PC equivalence, and Korean UI/browser proof.
decisions: Read-only audit only; no repo files edited.
Existing release/sync code is partial foundation and does not meet P1-12/P1-15 final readiness.
next_steps: Implement P1-12 release/recovery gates and artifacts.
Implement P1-15 safe sync/conflict gates and artifacts.
